title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Salar Jung Museum Act, 1961. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st July, 1961, vide notification No. G.S.R. 817, dated 15th June, 1961, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
